title: GLY's Can
description: Added a can that conveniently stores food.
body:
This mod adds a convenient food storage can that can hold up to ten food items at once, allowing you to consume them all in one go.

Sneak to place it on the ground, then right-click to add food (including potions).

The can can be eaten like regular food and is reusable.

Hold dye and click to change its color.
